claims.evidence_text: Table I. Recommended minimum temperatures needed for germination of selected agricultural crops. Agronomic Crops Minimum Soil Temperature at Planting (°F) ... Spring wheat ... 37
claims.claim_summary: Recommended minimum soil temperature at planting for spring wheat germination is 37°F.

claims.evidence_text: Minimum Soil Temperature for Crop Germination ... Spring wheat ... 37 (°F) ... seeds require optimum soil temperatures to germinate
claims.claim_summary: Spring wheat requires a minimum soil temperature of 37°F to germinate.
